domain: Russian matryoshka doll nested figures (recursive same-kind nesting)
specific_mechanism: Nested figures of decreasing size; each level is a self-similar smaller version.
llm_application: MATRY-LLM: nested coarse-to-fine token embedding where prefix of dimensions is itself a valid embedding at coarser granularity; single forward pass yields hierarchy.
novelty_claim: Matryoshka Representation Learning (2205.13147) and MatryoshkaLora (2605.07850) literally publish this. Functional collision is total — anti-novelty.
